name: Reeder 5
description: Reeder 5 is a polished RSS reader and read-later client for macOS. It supports iCloud syncing, Feedbin, Feedly, Instapaper, Pocket, and more, with a focus on a clean reading experience and Bionic Reading mode.

changelog.note: No publicly accessible changelog page. Release notes are only visible in the App Store listing under 'What's New'. The developer does not maintain a separate changelog or release notes URL.

notes: Paid app. Mac App Store only — no direct download, no Sparkle. App Store ID 6475002485 is for Reeder 5 specifically (the current major version). UNCERTAINTIES: iTunes API longevity concern — Apple may deprecate this endpoint. If Reeder 6 is released, it will have a different App Store ID. The lack of a public changelog means understanding what changed in each version requires reading the App Store listing or relying on third-party sources.
